sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ لِإِجْرَاءِ مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je otišao u veliku kompaniju na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to a large company for a new job interview.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَشْعُرُ بِالْقَلِيلِ مِنَ التَّوَتُّرِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i osjećao je malu nervozu.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and feeling a bit nervous.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَشَرَحَ مَهَارَاتِهِ لِلْمُدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio je na pitanja sa samopouzdanjem i objasnio svoje vještine menadžeru.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions confidently and explained his skills to the manager.

sentences.arabic: اِبْتَسَمَ الْمُدِيرُ وَقَالَ إِنَّهُ سَيَتَّصِلُ بِهِ قَرِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Menadžer se nasmiješio i rekao da će ga uskoro nazvati.
sentences.translationEn: The manager smiled and said he would call him soon.
